Author: GitHub
Description:
Watch how to fix a security vulnerability without writing a single line of code. Dependabot automatically finds risky packages in your repository and opens a pull request with the fixed version. You just need to review the changes, run your tests, and merge the fix. Learn how to enable this feature in your repository settings today. For more tips, check out GitHub for Beginners season 3: https://youtu.be/zhxXaFzzJYA

#Security #Dependabot #GitHub

Title: How to fix vulnerabilities automatically with Dependabot
